  "predict": "import torch\nimport triton\nimport triton.language as tl\n\n@triton.jit\ndef _airy_ai_kernel(x_ptr, out_ptr, n: tl.constexpr, BLOCK: tl.constexpr):\n    pid = tl.program_id(0)\n    offsets = pid * BLOCK + tl.arange(0, BLOCK)\n    mask = offsets < n\n    x = tl.load(x_ptr + offsets, mask=mask, other=0.0)\n    \n    # Airy function Ai(x) approximation using asymptotic expansion\n    # For x > 0, use asymptotic expansion\n    # For x <= 0, use series expansion\n    \n    # Constants for asymptotic expansion\n    sqrt_pi = 1.
